title: Curver Knit 40 Litre Laundry Basket, Misty Blue, 59.5 x 38.5 x 27.0 cm
features: Stylish storage solution – Ideal for bathroom and utility areas, offering a sleek and practical way to organise your space
Exclusive Knit design – Features comfortable handles, a flat inner surface, and a stackable structure for efficient storage
Compact 3 litre capacity – Perfect size for storing small items while keeping clutter under control
Durable, lightweight, and easy to clean – Made for everyday use with a wipe-clean surface for hassle-free maintenance
Made in the UK and Europe – Crafted with high-quality materials ensuring durability and responsible production
description: From the manufacturer Curver Knit Laundry Storage Basket, Misty Blue, 40 Litre Curver’s Knit range is inspired by the art and nostalgia of knitted textiles. Made from durable, long lasting resin with a natural open weave knit pattern, the Knit range is practical and stylish. The Knit 40 litre laundry basket can take pride of place in any bathroom, bedroom or utility room. It has a large 40 litre capacity and is designed to give good ventilation that will keep odours to a minimum. With large oval handles it makes usage easy and comfortable and it's easy to clean and maintain. Main Features Exclusive Knit Design Comfortable Handles Pure, Clean and Functional Shapes Ideal storage solutions for anywhere in your home Bathroom In your bathroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising your towels, toiletries and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Kitchen In your kitchen, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising all of your spices, accessories,and utensils keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Living Room In your living area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your magazines, blankets and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Office or Study In your office or study area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your all of your pens, notepads and books keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish.
